title: Humans and their Animal Muses
description: Explore 'Animal Therapy – Humans and their Animal Muses', a unique exhibition by Museum van de Geest. This showcase features works by popular British illustrator Louis Wain, known for his iconic cat paintings, alongside pieces by Marlene Dumas, Jan Hoek, and others. The exhibition delves into how animals support human well-being and inspire powerful art, highlighting their role in companionship, mental health, and emotional equilibrium.
newsletter_description: This unique exhibition at the Museum van de Geest explores the special bond between humans and animals, featuring iconic cat paintings by Louis Wain and works by other artists. My toddler absolutely loved seeing all the cats and animals on the walls, and then getting to draw her own -- on paper and also on their giant blackboard! It's a really sweet way to spend an hour together.
